trustedSourceSummary: No official consumer documents were found in the last 60 days, so the latest available official sources from 2025-2026 were used. Organizations used: Altroconsumo, Assoutenti APS. Altroconsumo’s March 2025 capsule test lists Dolce Gusto and Nespresso as top picks, providing fresh evidence of their quality and value.
